custom_fields.Job Description: CEO & Co-founder of Gumloop, an AI automation platform that enables anyone to build AI-powered workflows through a no-code drag-and-drop interface. Previously worked as a Software Engineer at Microsoft. Studied Software Engineering at McGill University.
custom_fields.Notes: Y Combinator W24 graduate. Gumloop raised $3.1M seed (2024) and $17M Series A (2025). Company serves major enterprises including Instacart, Webflow, Shopify. Platform has 110+ integrations and focuses on AI-powered workflow automation.
